overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a character walking along a dark dirt path at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path runs alongside a stone wall through a grassy rural area with distant trees visible against the night sky, creating an atmospheric and isolated environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight while exploring the dark rural area

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail illuminated by flashlight, showing tire tracks and footprints
tall wild grass flanking both sides of the dirt path
low stone or concrete wall running parallel to the path on the right side
dark silhouettes of trees visible in the distance against the night sky
clear dark night sky with minimal ambient light

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a dark dirt path in a rural area at night. A flashlight illuminates the immediate ground ahead, revealing the dirt trail and surrounding grass, while a stone wall runs along the right side. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with only the distant silhouettes of trees visible against the dark sky as the character continues walking forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a desolate rural path under the cover of night. It begins with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal a narrow dirt trail and the surrounding wild grass. As the camera advances, the beam of light steadily tracks the texture of the ground while a weathered stone wall guides the path on the right. The scene then expands to show the oppressive isolation of the landscape, with the light flickering across the terrain before the view opens toward the distant, dark silhouettes of trees against a midnight sky.
